# SIJIL MASTER EXTRACTION
# Purpose: Source of truth for building Qwen ingestion prompt
# Generated by reading every file ‚Äî nothing from memory
# Date: 2026-07-02
# Repo: sijil-core


---
## SCHEMA: common.schema.js

### Exported Schemas
- `SlugSchema`
- `idSchema(prefix)` (function)
- `PresentationProfileSchema`
- `BaseBlockFields` (object)

### SlugSchema
**Type:** z.string()
**Constraints:**
- Regex: `/^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$/` ‚Äî lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens between groups
- Max length: 80 characters
**Error message:** "Invalid slug format"

### idSchema(prefix)
**Type:** Higher-order function returning z.string()
**Purpose:** Creates specialized ID schemas with prefix validation
**Generated regex:** `/^{prefix}_[a-z0-9]+$/` where `{prefix}` is the argument passed
**Error message:** `ID must start with ${prefix}_`

### PresentationProfileSchema
**Type:** z.object()
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Enum Values / Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|--------------------------|
| `visual_layer_type` | z.string() | No | "standard_card" | ‚Äî |
| `theme_overrides` | z.object().passthrough() | No | {} | Accepts any additional properties |
| `animation_trigger` | z.enum() | No | "on-scroll" | "on-scroll", "on-load", "on-hover", "none" |
| `tailwind_classes` | z.string() | No | "" | ‚Äî |

### BaseBlockFields
**Type:** Plain object (not a schema, used as building block)
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `_id` | idSchema('blk') | Yes (in schema using this) | ‚Äî | Must match pattern `blk_[a-z0-9]+` |
| `block_order` | z.number().int().positive() | Yes | ‚Äî | Must be positive integer |
| `source_page` | z.number().int().positive() | Yes | ‚Äî | Must be positive integer |
| `html` | z.string().min(1) | Yes | ‚Äî | Non-empty string |
| `presentation_profile` | PresentationProfileSchema | Yes | ‚Äî | See PresentationProfileSchema above |


---
## SCHEMA: formula.schema.js

### Exported Schemas
- `FormulaSchema`

### FormulaSchema
**Type:** z.object()
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Enum Values / Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|--------------------------|
| `formula_id` | idSchema('frm') | No | ‚Äî | Must match pattern `frm_[a-z0-9]+` if provided |
| `name` | z.string().min(1) | Yes | ‚Äî | Non-empty string |
| `latex` | z.string().min(1) | Yes | ‚Äî | Non-empty LaTeX string |
| `text` | z.string().min(1) | Yes | ‚Äî | Non-empty plain text representation |
| `formula_type` | z.enum() | Yes | ‚Äî | "definition", "derivation", "law", "empirical" |
| `variables` | z.array(z.object(...)) | No | [] | Array of variable objects (see below) |
| `source_page` | z.number().int().positive() | No | ‚Äî | Positive integer |
| `subject_area` | z.string() | No | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `block_order_ref` | z.number().int() | No | ‚Äî | Integer reference to block order |

### variables Array Item Schema
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Notes |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------|
| `symbol` | z.string() | Yes | ‚Äî | Variable symbol (e.g., "F", "a") |
| `name` | z.string() | Yes | ‚Äî | Full name of variable |
| `unit` | z.string() | No | ‚Äî | Unit of measurement (optional) |
| `description` | z.string() | No | ‚Äî | Description of variable (optional) |


---
## SCHEMA: mcq.schema.js

### Exported Schemas
- `MCQSchema`

### MCQSchema
**Type:** z.object()
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Enum Values / Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|--------------------------|
| `mcq_id` | idSchema('mcq') | No | ‚Äî | Must match pattern `mcq_[a-z0-9]+` if provided |
| `question_number` | z.string() | No | ‚Äî | Question identifier string |
| `question_text` | z.string().min(1) | Yes | ‚Äî | Non-empty string |
| `options` | z.object({a, b, c, d}) | Yes | ‚Äî | Object with exactly 4 keys: a, b, c, d (all strings) |
| `correct_answer` | z.enum() | Yes | ‚Äî | "a", "b", "c", "d" |
| `explanation` | z.string() | No | "" | Can be empty string |
| `difficulty` | z.enum() | No | ‚Äî | "easy", "medium", "hard" |
| `bloom_level` | z.string() | No | ‚Äî | Bloom's taxonomy level (optional) |
| `source_page` | z.number().int().positive() | No | ‚Äî | Positive integer |
| `past_paper_years` | z.array(z.string()) | No | [] | Array of year strings |

### options Object Structure
| Key | Zod Type | Required | Notes |
|-----|----------|----------|-------|
| `a` | z.string() | Yes | Option A text |
| `b` | z.string() | Yes | Option B text |
| `c` | z.string() | Yes | Option C text |
| `d` | z.string() | Yes | Option D text |


---
## SCHEMA: documentIngest.schema.js

### Exported Schemas
- `CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION` (constant)
- `IngestMetadataSchema`
- `AccessControlSchema`
- `DocumentMetaSchema`
- `ContainerSchema`
- `DocumentIngestSchema`

### CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION
**Type:** String constant
**Value:** "2.0.0"

### IngestMetadataSchema
**Type:** z.object()
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `ingest_id` | idSchema('ing') | Yes | ‚Äî | Pattern: `ing_[a-z0-9]+` |
| `engine` | z.string() | No | ‚Äî | Engine name |
| `model_version` | z.string() | No | ‚Äî | Model version string |
| `prompt_version` | z.string() | No | ‚Äî | Prompt version |
| `ingest_timestamp` | z.string() | No | ‚Äî | Timestamp string |
| `processing_time_seconds` | z.number() | No | ‚Äî | Processing time |
| `source_file_name` | z.string() | No | ‚Äî | Source filename |
| `source_file_sha256` | z.string().min(1) | Yes | ‚Äî | Non-empty SHA256 hash |
| `source_file_size_bytes` | z.number() | No | ‚Äî | File size in bytes |
| `page_count` | z.number().int() | No | ‚Äî | Integer page count |
| `image_count` | z.number().int() | No | ‚Äî | Integer image count |
| `token_count_input` | z.number().int() | No | ‚Äî | Input token count |
| `token_count_output` | z.number().int() | No | ‚Äî | Output token count |
| `confidence_score` | z.number().min(0).max(1) | No | ‚Äî | Float 0-1 |
| `warnings` | z.array(z.string()) | No | [] | Array of warning strings |
| `status` | z.enum() | No | "pending" | "pending", "processing", "complete", "error" |

### AccessControlSchema
**Type:** z.object()
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `is_premium` | z.boolean() | No | false | Boolean flag |
| `preview_percentage` | z.number().min(0).max(100) | No | 100 | Integer 0-100 |
| `paywall_trigger_elements` | z.array(z.string()) | No | [] | Array of element identifiers |
| `allowed_roles` | z.array(z.string()) | No | ["anonymous"] | Array of role strings |

### DocumentMetaSchema
**Type:** z.object()
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Constraints |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `_id` | idSchema('doc') | Yes | ‚Äî | Pattern: `doc_[a-z0-9]+` |
| `document_id` | z.string().min(1) | Yes | ‚Äî | Non-empty document ID |
| `title` | z.string().min(1) | Yes | ‚Äî | Non-empty title |
| `title_vernacular` | z.string() | No | "" | Vernacular title |
| `subtitle` | z.string() | No | "" | Subtitle |
| `document_type` | z.string() | No | ‚Äî | Document type |
| `subject` | z.string() | No | ‚Äî | Subject name |
| `subject_slug` | SlugSchema | No | ‚Äî | Pattern: `^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$`, max 80 |
| `grade_level` | z.string() | No | ‚Äî | Grade level string |
| `grade_numeric` | z.number() | No | ‚Äî | Numeric grade |
| `language` | z.string() | No | "english" | Language code |
| `country` | z.string() | No | ‚Äî | Country code |
| `curriculum_standard` | z.string() | No | ‚Äî | Curriculum standard |
| `authors` | z.array(z.string()) | No | [] | Array of author names |
| `tags` | z.array(z.string()) | No | [] | Array of tags |
| `access_control` | AccessControlSchema | No | {} | See AccessControlSchema above |

### ContainerSchema
**Type:** z.object()
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Notes |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------|
| `_id` | idSchema('ch') | Yes | ‚Äî | Pattern: `ch_[a-z0-9]+` |
| `container_type` | z.string() | No | "chapter" | Container type (e.g., "chapter", "unit") |
| `number` | z.number().int().positive() | Yes | ‚Äî | Positive integer |
| `display_label` | z.string() | No | ‚Äî | Display label |
| `title` | z.string().min(1) | Yes | ‚Äî | Non-empty title |
| `slug` | SlugSchema | Yes | ‚Äî | Pattern: `^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$`, max 80 |
| `page_range` | z.object({start, end}) | No | ‚Äî | See below |
| `total_pages` | z.number().int() | No | ‚Äî | Total pages |

### page_range Sub-schema (within ContainerSchema)
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|----------|----------|-------|
| `start` | z.number().int() | Yes | Start page number |
| `end` | z.number().int() | Yes | End page number |

### DocumentIngestSchema
**Type:** z.object()
**Fields:**
| Field | Zod Type | Required | Default | Notes |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|-------|
| `schema_version` | z.literal("2.0.0") | Yes | ‚Äî | Must be exactly "2.0.0" |
| `schema_type` | z.string().min(1) | Yes | ‚Äî | Non-empty schema type identifier |
| `ingest_metadata` | IngestMetadataSchema | Yes | ‚Äî | See IngestMetadataSchema above |
| `document_metadata` | DocumentMetaSchema | Yes | ‚Äî | See DocumentMetaSchema above |
| `container` | ContainerSchema | Yes | ‚Äî | See ContainerSchema above |
| `topics` | z.array(TopicIngestSchema).min(1) | Yes | ‚Äî | At least 1 topic |
| `type_specific_data` | z.record(z.string(), z.any()) | No | {} | Arbitrary key-value pairs |
